mapper.select: SELECT * FROM patra_ingest.ing_plan WHERE plan_key = #{planKey} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM patra_ingest.ing_plan WHERE schedule_instance_id = #{scheduleInstanceId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM patra_ingest.ing_plan WHERE plan_key = #{planKey} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE patra_ingest.ing_plan SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{planId}
